text.title: STAR Interview Framework Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 4-step procedure to apply STAR Interview Framework. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: pick-competencies
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: write-anchors
step.action: For each competency, write 5-level behavior anchors with concrete examples per level.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: calibrate
step.action: Run a calibration session with all interviewers; revise anchors until disagreement <1 level.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: pilot-and-publish
step.action: Run with one cohort; if irater_agreement ≥ 0.6, publish.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
